publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2024-11-13 23:59:09 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence, publications and alphabetical subject file.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Milton Esman Papers, #14-16-4204 . Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Milton Esman, was the John S. Knight Professor of International Studies. He joined the Dept. of Government in 1969, served as director of the Mario Einaudi Center for International Studies (1969-1983) and retired in 1989. He was a specialist in peace studies and ethnic studies and he helped draft Japan's post-war constitution.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Series includes reference files, speeches, articles, and correspondence that Esman arranged loosely in alphabetical order.
